title: Collection Conversions
short_description: Master iterator-based collection conversions: Vec to HashSet, HashMap from tuples, and more.

title: BTreeSet Ranges
short_description: Master ordered sets with BTreeSet: range queries, finding closest elements, and efficient subset iteration.

title: Entry API Pattern
short_description: Master HashMap's Entry API for efficient map updates: or_insert, or_insert_with, and_modify patterns.

title: Binary Heap Operations
short_description: Master priority queues with BinaryHeap: max-heap, min-heap, top-K elements, and heap sort.

title: LinkedList Basics
short_description: Learn LinkedList operations: add/remove from both ends, peek, move-to-front for LRU patterns, and list concatenation.

title: HashMap Advanced
short_description: Optimize HashMap performance with capacity management, reserve, shrink, bulk operations, and efficient merging.

title: Reading Files
short_description: Learn basic file reading patterns: read_to_string, BufReader, counting lines and words, and reading specific lines.

title: Writing Files
short_description: Master file writing patterns: write_all, BufWriter, appending to files, and efficient buffered writes.

title: Path Operations
short_description: Master cross-platform path handling with Path and PathBuf: joining, extracting components, and modifying extensions.

title: Directory Traversal
short_description: Learn to traverse directory trees: list files, find by extension/name, calculate sizes, and count files recursively.

title: File Metadata
short_description: Learn to work with file metadata: get file size, type, permissions, modification times, and compare files.

title: Stdio Operations
short_description: Master standard I/O operations: reading from stdin, writing to stdout/stderr, and buffer flushing.

title: Temporary Files
short_description: Work with temporary files and directories: creation, cleanup patterns, and RAII-style automatic deletion.

title: Iterator Combinators
short_description: Master iterator combinators: chain, zip, take, skip, rev, and create interleaved and sliding pair sequences.

title: Iterator Inspection
short_description: Learn iterator inspection methods: enumerate for indices, peekable for lookahead, and inspect for debugging.

title: Fold and Scan
short_description: Master stateful iteration with fold() for aggregation and scan() for running computations like cumulative sums and averages.

title: Iterator Filtering
short_description: Master iterator filtering methods: filter, filter_map, take_while, skip_while for selective data processing.

title: Iterator Flattening
short_description: Process nested collections with flatten() and flat_map() to work with hierarchical data structures.

title: Custom Iterators
short_description: Implement the Iterator trait to create custom iterators: Fibonacci, StepRange, Collatz, Windows, and Unfold patterns.

title: From and Into Traits
short_description: Master Rust's standard conversion traits From and Into for type-safe, ergonomic conversions between types.

title: TryFrom and TryInto
short_description: Learn fallible conversions with TryFrom and TryInto traits for validated type transformations that can fail gracefully.

title: AsRef and AsMut
short_description: Learn AsRef and AsMut traits for cheap reference-to-reference conversions, enabling generic functions that accept multiple types.

title: Borrow and ToOwned
short_description: Master Borrow and ToOwned traits for owned vs borrowed patterns, and use Cow for efficient copy-on-write data handling.

title: ToString and Display
short_description: Learn the Display trait for user-facing output and how ToString is automatically implemented when you implement Display.

title: Deref and DerefMut
short_description: Master Deref and DerefMut traits for smart pointer patterns and deref coercion.

title: Duration Operations
short_description: Learn to work with std::time::Duration for time spans, formatting, arithmetic, and comparisons.

title: SystemTime Usage
short_description: Work with std::time::SystemTime for timestamps, Unix epoch calculations, and time comparisons.

title: Environment Variables
short_description: Learn to read environment variables, parse configuration values, and access process information using std::env.

title: Process and Exit
short_description: Work with process IDs, exit codes, and process lifecycle management using std::process.

title: Number Conversions
short_description: Learn safe numeric type conversions using TryFrom/TryInto and overflow-safe arithmetic with checked, saturating, and wrapping operations.

title: Floating Point Edge Cases
short_description: Handle floating-point special values (NaN, infinity), rounding, approximate comparisons, and safe arithmetic operations.

title: Integer Parsing
short_description: Parse integers from strings in various bases (decimal, binary, hex, octal) with error handling and automatic base detection.

title: Number Formatting
short_description: Format numbers for display with padding, alignment, different bases (binary, hex, octal), precision, and currency formatting.

title: Clone and Copy Traits
short_description: Understand Clone and Copy traits for duplicating values: derive macros, Copy constraints, and generic clone patterns.

title: Debug and Display Derive
short_description: Master Debug and Display traits for formatting types: derive Debug automatically, implement Display manually for user-facing output.

title: PartialEq and Eq
short_description: Learn equality traits PartialEq and Eq: derive for standard comparison, implement manually for custom equality logic.

title: PartialOrd and Ord
short_description: Master ordering traits PartialOrd and Ord: derive for standard ordering, implement custom comparison logic for sorting and min/max.

title: Hash Trait
short_description: Master the Hash trait for using custom types as HashMap keys and HashSet elements: derive vs manual implementation, consistency with Eq.

title: Default Trait Patterns
short_description: Master the Default trait for creating default values: derive for standard defaults, implement custom defaults, struct update syntax patterns.

title: Box and Heap Allocation
short_description: Learn heap allocation with Box<T>: boxing values, recursive types, and modifying boxed data.

title: Rc and Reference Counting
short_description: Learn shared ownership with Rc<T>: reference counting, Weak references, shared data structures, and observer patterns.

title: Arc and Thread Safety
short_description: Learn thread-safe shared ownership with Arc<T>: atomic reference counting, Mutex for shared mutable state, and AtomicUsize for lock-free counters.

title: Cell and RefCell
short_description: Master interior mutability with Cell<T> and RefCell<T>: runtime borrow checking, shared mutable state, and the Rc<RefCell<T>> pattern.

title: Cow (Copy-on-Write)
short_description: Master the Cow smart pointer for efficient borrowed vs owned data handling: avoid unnecessary clones with copy-on-write semantics.
